title: machilus grandibracteatus
intro: Machilus grandibracteatus, also known as the large-bracted machilus, is a plant species in the family Lauraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and promoting respiratory health. Machilus grandibracteatus is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
